authority: repository-local governance reconciliation only; not authority to delete remote repositories, mutate CC Switch, install Skills, change live Agent or Hook state, commit, or push

currentProductDirection.operationalSkillSourceAndLifecycleManage: CC Switch where supported, otherwise consumer-owned mechanisms
currentProductDirection.hostSpecificConfigurationAuthority: the consuming Agent or user configuration owner
currentProductDirection.liveRuntimeAuthority: the consuming runtime and accountable user
currentProductDirection.authoringRule: repository-authored Skills or Hooks require a supported reproducible residual gap and a separate authorized task
currentProductDirection.reactivationRule: a custom Manager may be reconsidered only after a concrete residual operational-management gap, failed viable alternatives, bounded consumer scope, migration cost, and separate owner authority are evidenced

currentIdentityMigration.reason: the current objective is source-preserving cross-Agent governance and consumption, not custom Manager production

historicalEvidenceRetention.reason: preserve provenance, accepted historical decisions, bounded experiment results, rollback understanding, and evidence against rebuilding the same surface without a new gap

nonActions: no deletion or rewriting of historical Manager evidence
no custom Manager implementation or repository creation
no CC Switch installation, configuration, or source mutation
no live Agent, Skill, Hook, Plugin, App, MCP, account, or user-configuration mutation
no candidate execution, admission, or release
no cross-repository write, commit, or push
verificationSurface: the current strategic objective uses a positive source-preserving cross-Agent identity
current acceptance and verification IDs no longer imply an active custom Manager product
the superseded Manager initiative references only historical evidence and retirement reconciliation
historical artifact filenames, IDs, accepted decisions, and validation remain preserved
README and program projections distinguish current direction from historical evidence
repository verification and mutation tests reject Manager reactivation without a new bound decision
